title: Findings by severity / min
description: Security findings by severity level in 1-minute tumbling windows.
viz_content: SELECT window_start AS time, severity, count() AS findings FROM tumble(ocsf.v_ocsf_security_finding_flatten, 1m) WHERE severity IN ('Critical','High','Medium') GROUP BY window_start, severity

title: Malware by classification (15m)
description: Malware detection counts grouped by classification in the last 15 minutes.
viz_content: SELECT malware_classification, count() AS detections, count_distinct(malware_name) AS unique_malware FROM table(ocsf.v_ocsf_security_finding_flatten) WHERE malware_name != '' AND _tp_time > now() - interval 15 minute GROUP BY malware_classification ORDER BY detections DESC

title: Top finding titles (15m)
description: Most frequently occurring security finding titles in the last 15 minutes.
viz_content: SELECT finding_title, count() AS occurrences, max(severity) AS max_severity FROM table(ocsf.v_ocsf_security_finding_flatten) WHERE _tp_time > now() - interval 15 minute GROUP BY finding_title ORDER BY occurrences DESC LIMIT 10
